_comment: Each channel is dedicated to one account/deal. channel_id maps to identity_map.channel_mappings.

messages.text: Just got off the Acme Corp discovery call. CTO dropped a data residency bomb — us-east-1 only, non-negotiable from compliance. We can do it but I want to make sure we flag this in the deal notes. Sarah (analytics lead) is the champion, Mike (CTO) is the technical gatekeeper.
Good call flagging this early. What's the budget look like?
~$80K annually, already approved. Sarah mentioned flexibility if ROI is strong. I think we can push to $90K with the right packaging. They're doubling their analytics team in Q1 so there's urgency.
That's a solid deal. Loop in Jordan for the SE deep-dive and let's get this into technical validation this week.

Finished the Acme technical deep-dive. All requirements met — RLS, PII masking, audit logs, Splunk integration. One thing: Mike added a SIEM requirement that wasn't in the original list. I'm now wondering if there are more surprises coming. Alex, might be worth getting a formal requirements sign-off before we go further.

Agreed. I'll put together a requirements doc and get Sarah to confirm before we send the technical spec. Big news though — Sarah asked about a 2-year deal unprompted. I think they've already had the internal budget conversation.
That's a great sign. What's our 2-year pricing look like? Can we do 10% off for 2-year upfront?
I'll run it by finance today. If they approved $80K annually, 2-year upfront at ~$144K ($72K/yr) seems achievable. Will get pricing out by Friday.
